what does main.go do
❯ what does main.go do
⠋ Thinking...⠙ Thinking...⠹ Thinking...
The `main.go` file is the entry point for the application. It:

1. Parses command-line flags
2. Loads configuration from `COVEN_CONFIG` or default path
3. Initializes the gateway with gRPC and HTTP servers
4. Starts listening for agent connections

The key function is `runServe()` which orchestrates the full startup sequence.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

❯
